auth_head_desc: Sign in to XeomX to save prompts, follow creators, and unlock premium drops.
terms_head_desc: The terms that govern your use of XeomX.
terms_body:
Welcome to XeomX. By accessing or using our platform you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

Account. You may need to create an account to access certain features. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide and for safeguarding your credentials. You must be at least 13 years old to use XeomX.

Content. XeomX offers prompts, collections, and community features. You retain ownership of the content you submit, but you grant XeomX a worldwide, non-exclusive license to host, display, and distribute it as needed to operate the service. You are responsible for what you publish and must not upload material that is unlawful, infringing, or harmful.

Acceptable use. Do not attempt to disrupt the service, reverse engineer it, scrape it at scale, or use it to build a competing product. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

Paid features. Some parts of XeomX may require payment. Pricing and terms of any subscription or purchase will be shown at the point of sale. See our Refund Policy for details on refunds.

Disclaimer. XeomX is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. To the maximum extent permitted by law, XeomX is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.

Changes. We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

Contact. For questions about these terms, reach us through the contact channels on our platform.
privacy_head_desc: What information XeomX collects and how we use it.
privacy_body:
This Privacy Policy explains what information XeomX collects, how we use it, and the choices you have.

Information we collect. When you join our waitlist we collect the email address you submit along with the section you signed up for. When you create an account we collect the identifiers provided by your chosen sign-in method (for example your name, email, and avatar from Google). We also collect basic technical information such as IP address, browser type, and pages visited to keep the service secure and understand usage.

How we use information. We use your information to operate XeomX, communicate with you about the service, respond to your requests, prevent abuse, and improve our features. We do not sell your personal information.

Sharing. We share information with service providers who help us run the platform (such as hosting, authentication, and analytics) under confidentiality obligations. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect the rights and safety of our users.

Your choices. You can request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information by contacting us. You can unsubscribe from waitlist and marketing emails at any time using the link in the email.

Retention. We keep your information only as long as needed to provide the service and comply with our legal obligations.

Security. We take reasonable measures to protect your information, but no system is perfectly secure.

Children. XeomX is not intended for children under 13.

Changes. We may update this policy from time to time. The date at the top reflects the most recent update.
cookies_head_desc: How XeomX uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookies_body:
XeomX uses cookies and similar technologies to make the platform work and to understand how it is used.

Essential cookies. These are required for the site to function, including sign-in sessions, security, and remembering your language preference. Without them, features such as authentication would not work.

Analytics cookies. We use a limited set of analytics cookies to measure aggregate usage — for example, how many people visit a page or how a new feature performs. These help us improve XeomX. Analytics data is aggregated and not used to identify individual visitors.

Third-party cookies. When you sign in through Google, that provider may set its own cookies. Please review Google's privacy documentation for details.

Managing cookies. You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may prevent parts of XeomX from working correctly.

Do Not Track. Our platform does not currently respond to Do Not Track signals.

Changes. If we make significant changes to how we use cookies, we will update this page and the date shown at the top.
refund_head_desc: How refunds work for paid features on XeomX.
refund_body:
Because XeomX is an early-stage platform, most features are currently free to use. This Refund Policy covers any paid features that may become available.

Digital products. Prompt packs, collections, and other digital purchases are delivered immediately upon payment. Because these items are consumed as soon as they are unlocked, all sales are generally final.

Subscriptions. If a paid subscription is offered, you may cancel at any time from your account. Cancellation stops future billing; the current billing period will continue until it ends. We do not provide pro-rated refunds for partial periods unless required by law.

Refund requests. If you were charged in error, if the product was not delivered, or if you believe you are entitled to a refund under applicable consumer protection law, contact us within 14 days of the charge. We will review each request in good faith and respond within a reasonable time.

Chargebacks. Please contact us before initiating a chargeback so we can try to resolve the issue directly.

Changes. We may update this policy as our paid offerings evolve. The date at the top reflects the most recent update.
